title: dodonaea inaequifolia
intro: Dodonaea inaequifolia, also known as the broad-leaved hop-bush, is a plant species native to eastern Australia and Lord Howe Island. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dodonaea inaequifolia include its ability to alleviate fever, soothe skin irritations, and reduce inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
